marketing.blurb: Twenty-six disciplines named for the 26 letters of the marketing alphabet — every channel, every signal, every lever a brand needs to capture and convert demand. Five categories, one compounding system.

categories.title: Performance & Paid Media
categories.intro: Precision-targeted paid acquisition across every major platform — architected around your revenue model, powered by AI bidding, and optimized to your exact CAC thresholds.

services.title: PPC Advertising
services.description: Google & Microsoft Ads built around your unit economics — bidding, structure, and creative tied directly to revenue, not vanity metrics.
services.example: Restructured a $400K/mo Google Ads account around contribution margin segments — blended ROAS 1.8× → 4.6× in 90 days.

services.title: Display Advertising
services.description: Programmatic display and rich media across premium inventory — audience-first targeting with dynamic creative optimization at scale.
services.example: DV360 prospecting program for a fintech reduced CPL by 38% while expanding reach to 4 new ICP segments.

services.title: Mobile Marketing
services.description: Mobile-first campaigns spanning in-app advertising, SMS, push, and mobile DSPs — with deep-link attribution and device-level analytics.
services.example: SKAdNetwork-aware iOS strategy for a wellness app drove 2.4× install volume at flat CPI post-ATT.

services.title: Amazon & Marketplace Growth
services.description: Full Amazon DSP and Sponsored Ads management — keyword strategy, listing optimization, and Amazon Attribution for marketplace brands.
services.example: Took a CPG brand from $80K to $620K monthly Amazon revenue in 7 months without raising blended ACoS.

services.title: YouTube & Video Advertising
services.description: Full-funnel video strategy across YouTube, CTV, and OLV — from view-through-driven brand campaigns to direct-response action ads.
services.example: Launched a 6-asset YouTube Action campaign for a SaaS brand — added $1.2M ARR pipeline at $87 CAC.

categories.title: AI & Intelligence
categories.intro: Custom ML models, generative content systems, and autonomous agents that handle the work humans shouldn't — at machine speed, with consistent quality, around the clock.

services.title: Marketing Data Architecture
services.description: First-party data infrastructure — CDPs, data lakes, and event-tracking schemas — so you own your signals and never rely on a platform's black box.
services.example: Built a Snowflake + Segment stack for a DTC brand consolidating 11 data sources into one source of truth.

services.title: AI Chatbot & Conversational
services.description: AI-powered chat across web, WhatsApp, and Messenger — qualifying leads, answering high-intent queries, and booking meetings 24/7 at scale.
services.example: Deployed a Claude-powered concierge agent for a B2B SaaS — booked 412 demos in Q1 without a human SDR involved.

services.title: Marketing Automation Architecture
services.description: Sophisticated workflows across HubSpot, Marketo, or ActiveCampaign — lead scoring, nurture sequences, and trigger-based campaigns that run autonomously.
services.example: Rebuilt a HubSpot workspace for a 50-person SaaS — lead-to-MQL time dropped from 9 days to 14 hours.

services.title: Generative AI Content Systems
services.description: Custom LLM-powered content engines that produce on-brand output at speed — blog posts to ad copy, trained on your voice and continuously optimized.
services.example: Trained a fine-tuned content engine for a media client producing 80 articles/month at 1/6 the previous cost.

services.title: Predictive Lead Scoring
services.description: ML models trained on your CRM data to rank leads by conversion likelihood — so sales spends time only on accounts most likely to close.
services.example: Predictive model for an enterprise SaaS lifted close rate on top-quartile leads from 8% to 31%.

services.title: AI Personalization Engines
services.description: Recommendation and personalization layers across web, email, and ads — the Netflix model applied to your customer experience at every touchpoint.
services.example: On-site personalization for a fashion DTC brand lifted AOV by 18% and repeat-purchase rate by 27%.

categories.title: Brand & Creative
categories.intro: The strategic and design foundation that determines whether downstream tactics succeed or fail — positioning, identity, and conversion-grade creative built to perform, not just look good.

services.title: Brand Strategy & Positioning
services.description: Sharp, defensible market positioning rooted in customer research and competitive intelligence — the foundation every paid dollar leverages.
services.example: Repositioned a Series-A health-tech startup around clinician outcomes — pipeline velocity 2.3× in 4 months.

services.title: UX/UI Design for Funnels
services.description: Conversion-grade landing pages, checkout flows, and product UX — designed against real session recordings, not best-practice mood boards.
services.example: Rebuilt a SaaS pricing page based on 600 hours of session replay — free-trial signups +71% in 30 days.

services.title: Brand Identity & Visual Systems
services.description: Distinctive identity systems — logo, type, color, voice — built to scale across paid creative, social, product, and packaging.
services.example: Designed a complete identity system for a B2B fintech rebrand, deployed across 14 channels in 6 weeks.

services.title: Motion Graphics & Animation
services.description: Performance-grade motion creative — from 6-second hooks to 60-second explainers — engineered for the format and platform that pays back.
services.example: Produced 38 short-form motion variants for a DTC brand — top performer drove 4.1× the account average ROAS.

categories.title: Content & Lifecycle
categories.intro: The compounding channels — content that builds topical authority, lifecycle programs that turn lists into revenue engines, and e-commerce growth systems that scale at zero fixed cost.

services.title: Content Marketing & SEO
services.description: Editorial-grade content tied to commercial intent — built around topic clusters and search demand, not arbitrary keyword lists.
services.example: Took a B2B SaaS from 4K to 187K monthly organic sessions in 18 months. Pipeline contribution: $4.2M ARR.

services.title: Social Media Marketing
services.description: Brand-led organic social — TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn — with content calendars built against actual platform mechanics, not stock advice.
services.example: Built a TikTok-first program for a beverage brand — 2.1M followers and 4 viral product launches in 12 months.

services.title: Email Marketing
services.description: Lifecycle email programs — welcome flows, abandonment, win-back, post-purchase — engineered for revenue per recipient, not opens.
services.example: Klaviyo overhaul for a DTC brand lifted email-attributed revenue from 14% to 31% of total in 60 days.

services.title: Affiliate Marketing
services.description: Performance affiliate programs — partner recruitment, commission architecture, fraud prevention — that scale at zero fixed cost.
services.example: Launched an Impact-managed program for a DTC apparel brand — $1.8M incremental revenue in year one.

services.title: E-commerce Growth Strategy
services.description: End-to-end DTC growth — from acquisition mix to merchandising to lifecycle — managed against contribution margin, not vanity GMV.
services.example: Doubled net contribution margin for an 8-figure DTC brand in 9 months while holding revenue flat — sustainable scale.

services.title: Shopify / WooCommerce Optimization
services.description: Platform-deep CRO — checkout, PDP, search, bundling — built on actual session data, not best-practice articles.
services.example: Shopify checkout redesign for a beauty DTC brand reduced abandonment by 24% and lifted AOV by $11.

services.title: Subscription & Retention
services.description: Subscription program design and retention engineering — pricing, packaging, churn modeling, and win-back — focused on LTV expansion.
services.example: Redesigned subscription tiers for a wellness brand — month-3 churn dropped from 22% to 9%.

services.title: Marketplace Launch & Management
services.description: Cross-marketplace strategy — Amazon, Walmart, Target+, TikTok Shop — managed as a coordinated portfolio, not a series of side projects.
services.example: Launched a CPG brand across 4 marketplaces simultaneously — $2.4M aggregate Q1 revenue from a standing start.

categories.title: Strategy & Consulting
categories.intro: Senior strategic leadership for inflection moments — pre-Series B, market entry, repositioning, or scaling the in-house function. Embedded operators, not deck-makers.

services.title: Revenue Operations (RevOps)
services.description: End-to-end revenue tooling, attribution, forecasting, and reporting — connecting marketing, sales, and finance under one model.
services.example: Rebuilt the RevOps stack for a $40M ARR SaaS — forecast accuracy from ±28% to ±6% in two quarters.

services.title: Fractional CMO Services
services.description: Senior marketing leadership embedded for 6–18 months — running the function, building the team, and handing it back stronger than you found it.
services.example: 9-month fractional CMO engagement at a Series-B health-tech — built and hired a 12-person marketing function from scratch.

services.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
services.description: End-to-end GTM design — ICP, positioning, channel mix, pricing, packaging, and the operating model to execute it.
services.example: Designed the US GTM for a European SaaS entering the market — first-quarter pipeline beat plan by 64%.

technology.blurb: Twenty engineering services — custom software, AI infrastructure, integrations, data systems, and contact-center technology — that turn your marketing inputs into measurable, ownable assets. Built to your spec, hosted long-term, and architected to scale.

categories.title: Web & App Development
categories.intro: Production-grade websites, landing pages, web apps, e-commerce storefronts, and mobile apps — engineered to convert paid traffic and operate at scale.

services.title: Custom Web Application Development
services.description: Bespoke client portals, internal ops tools, workflow platforms, booking systems — encoding your exact processes into software you own.
services.example: Built an ops web app for a multi-location auto repair chain — throughput +34% in month one without adding staff.

services.title: Website Design & Development
services.description: Conversion-focused sites on Next.js, Webflow, or WordPress — Core Web Vitals, accessibility, and SEO baked into the foundation.
services.example: Rebuilt a consulting firm's website on Next.js — organic traffic +180% in 6 months, inbound consult requests +340%.

services.title: Landing Page & Funnel Development
services.description: Purpose-built, A/B-test-ready pages for paid traffic — message-match from ad to page, single objective, zero exit paths.
services.example: Built 6 campaign-specific pages for a roofing company — conversion 1.3% → 5.8%; CPL $210 → $46.

services.title: E-commerce Website Development
services.description: Shopify, WooCommerce, or headless commerce — custom themes, ERP/3PL integration, subscription architecture, and mobile-first speed.
services.example: Rebuilt a furniture DTC store on Shopify 2.0 — mobile load 6.2s → 1.8s; mobile conversion 0.7% → 2.4%.

services.title: Custom Client & Customer Portals
services.description: Branded login portals where clients access reports, submit requests, track projects, and manage subscriptions — replacing email chains.
services.example: Built a portal for an 80-client agency — report-related support tickets dropped 91%, CSAT up 28%.

services.title: Mobile App Development (iOS & Android)
services.description: Native-quality apps in React Native or Flutter — full lifecycle from product definition through App Store submission and CI/CD.
services.example: Built iOS/Android apps for a home services co. — 58% customer adoption, 42% phone-booking decline, $18K/mo cost cut.

services.title: SaaS Product Build & MVP Development
services.description: Software products from concept to revenue — architecture, UX, full-stack, payments, onboarding, and launch strategy as one team.
services.example: Built a $99/mo legal-tech MVP in 9 weeks for $68K — 340 signups in 30 days, 48% trial-to-paid.

categories.title: AI & Automation
categories.intro: Voice agents, conversational bots, and end-to-end AI workflows that replace repetitive knowledge work — at machine speed, with consistent quality, around the clock.

services.title: Voice AI Agent Development
services.description: AI agents that handle inbound and outbound phone calls — qualifying leads, booking appointments, escalating when needed. Built on Vapi, ElevenLabs, Bland.
services.example: Deployed a voice AI for a med-spa — missed-call rate 34% → 3%; $14,200 in booked appointments month one.

services.title: AI Chat & Conversational Bots
services.description: Custom chat agents trained on your knowledge base — deployed across web, WhatsApp, IG DMs, SMS — that respond like your best team member.
services.example: Built a chat agent for a B2B SaaS — resolved 74% of conversations without human escalation; 40% drop in pre-sales tickets.

services.title: AI Workflow & Process Automation
services.description: LLM-powered pipelines for invoice processing, contract review, document parsing, classification — replacing repetitive analyst work.
services.example: Built an AI memo-processing pipeline for a real-estate fund — analyst-hours per month 600 → 40 with same quality.

categories.title: CRM & Integrations
categories.intro: Custom CRM builds, platform migrations, API development, and marketing automation infrastructure — connecting your systems into a single source of truth.

services.title: CRM Development & Customization
services.description: Custom CRM builds and deep platform configuration — HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, GoHighLevel — designed around your actual sales process.
services.example: Redesigned Salesforce for an 85-rep cleaning company — adoption 34% → 94%; first accurate forecast in 3 years.

services.title: CRM Integration & Migration
services.description: Zero-downtime platform migrations and bidirectional integrations — preserving every record, every relationship, every history field.
services.example: Migrated 6 years / 14K deals / 200K activities from HubSpot to Salesforce over one weekend — zero records lost.

services.title: API Development & Third-Party Integrations
services.description: Custom REST/GraphQL APIs and webhooks connecting your stack — eliminating manual export-import workflows that drain staff hours.
services.example: Built a central integration layer for a franchisor — 12 weekly hours of manual data transfer eliminated.

services.title: Marketing Automation Platform Build
services.description: Full architecture on HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, Marketo, or Pardot — scoring, nurture flows, segmentation, and CRM sync.
services.example: Activated a stagnant HubSpot for a B2B firm — $0 → $1.8M tracked marketing-attributed pipeline in 90 days.

categories.title: Data & Reporting
categories.intro: Real-time dashboards, database architecture, and analytics infrastructure — turning fragmented data into the decision-grade signal your leadership team needs.

services.title: Custom Reporting & BI Dashboards
services.description: Executive dashboards in Looker Studio, Power BI, Tableau, or custom web — built around the decisions that matter, not the data that's easy to export.
services.example: Built a Looker Studio dashboard for an 18-location restaurant group — caught food-cost anomalies 5 days earlier; saved ~$28K/mo.

services.title: Database Design & Architecture
services.description: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, BigQuery, Snowflake — schema design, indexing, query optimization, migration, and DR architecture.
services.example: Optimized database for a SaaS analytics platform — load times 18–45s → under 2s; annual churn 35% → 18%.

services.title: Analytics & Tracking Implementation
services.description: GA4, GTM, Meta and TikTok Pixel, server-side tracking, and Conversions API — so your ad platforms train on accurate signals.
services.example: Server-side tracking rebuild for an e-comm brand — conversion data completeness 40% → 94%; CPA −31% in 6 weeks.

categories.title: Contact Center & Hosting
categories.intro: Cloud contact center setup, VoIP and telephony, plus ongoing managed hosting and maintenance — the infrastructure that keeps the business running 24/7.

services.title: Contact Center Software Setup
services.description: Five9, Genesys, Aircall, Twilio Flex, RingCentral — IVR design, routing, scripting, recording, supervision dashboards, and CRM integration.
services.example: Reconfigured Aircall for a pest-control company — abandon rate 28% → 6%; average handle time −22%.

services.title: VoIP & Telephony Implementation
services.description: Cloud VoIP system design — number provisioning, SIP trunks, call queues, ring groups, IVR, and CRM integration with zero-downtime migration.
services.example: Migrated a 200-unit property management company from legacy PBX to cloud VoIP over one weekend — zero downtime; 30% time-on-call reduction.

services.title: Software Maintenance, Support & Hosting
services.description: Ongoing managed hosting, security patching, dependency updates, performance monitoring, and SLA-backed bug resolution.
services.example: Patched two high-severity vulnerabilities for a healthcare client — prevented estimated $500K–$1M HIPAA exposure.

dispatch.blurb: Twenty live and AI-powered dispatch services — the human-and-machine front line that turns inbound interest into booked revenue. Inbound, outbound, AI voice, scheduling, and quality operations — running 24/7 across every brand we operate.

categories.title: Inbound & Reception
categories.intro: Trained agents handling every inbound interaction — first impression, qualification, escalation, multilingual coverage, and white-glove VIP handling.

services.title: Inbound Call Handling & Reception
services.description: Live agents answering in your brand voice — handling inquiries, routing to the right team, capturing data with real-time CRM logging.
services.example: Inbound agents for a Miami luxury hotel recovered ~$82K/month in direct booking inquiries previously lost to voicemail.

services.title: 24/7 After-Hours Answering
services.description: Live or AI agents covering nights, weekends, holidays — taking messages, handling urgent inquiries, and triggering on-call escalations.
services.example: After-hours service for an HVAC company captured $42K/month in emergency revenue previously lost between 6pm–8am.

services.title: Live Agent Lead Qualification
services.description: Structured qualification at first contact — budget, timeline, fit, authority — only pre-qualified prospects reach your sales team.
services.example: For a solar installer: sales-team capacity effectively doubled; close rate on contacted leads 12% → 28%.

services.title: Multilingual Inbound Support
services.description: Spanish, French, Portuguese, Mandarin, Arabic, Tagalog, Hindi — native-speaking agents serving callers in their preferred language.
services.example: Spanish-language inbound for an LA dental group — Spanish-speaking new-patient bookings reached 22% of total in 4 months.

services.title: Escalation & VIP Client Handling
services.description: Senior agents, white-glove protocols, 30-min response SLA, and direct executive escalation paths for your highest-value accounts.
services.example: VIP protocol for a property mgmt firm protecting $3.2M of $4.8M ARR — zero Tier-1 churn over 18 months.

categories.title: AI Voice Agents
categories.intro: Always-on voice AI that handles triage, booking, and outbound follow-up — picking up every call instantly, no matter the volume or hour.

services.title: AI Voice — Inbound Triage
services.description: Always-on AI that answers every call instantly, understands intent via NLP, resolves routine queries, and routes complex calls with full context.
services.example: AI triage for a national insurance brokerage — hold time 8min → 2min; abandon rate 22% → 4%; agent capacity +23%.

services.title: AI Voice — Appointment Booking
services.description: Fully automated booking, confirming, rescheduling, and canceling — integrated with your scheduling platform, working 24/7.
services.example: Booking AI for a multi-location physio practice — handled 79% of booking calls; weekend missed-calls fell to zero.

services.title: AI Voice — Outbound Follow-Up
services.description: AI-powered outbound calling at scale — lead follow-up, appointment confirmations, post-service surveys, and reactivation campaigns.
services.example: AI outbound for a roofing company — every uncontacted lead reached within 4 hours; inspection bookings +187% month one.

categories.title: Outbound & Sales
categories.intro: Live agents executing the high-conversion outbound work that closes the gap between leads generated and revenue booked.

services.title: Live Quote Generation & Estimation
services.description: Trained agents quoting in real-time over the phone — collecting job details, calculating to your pricing model, booking the next step before they hang up.
services.example: Quote agents for a landscaper — average time-to-quote 31hrs → 15min; inquiry-to-booking 28% → 51%.

services.title: Outbound Follow-Up & Lead Nurture
services.description: Structured 5-touch outbound sequences — phone, voicemail, scripted persistence — closing the gap between leads generated and leads contacted.
services.example: Auto body shop: web lead-to-job conversion 21% → 47%; +$39K/month from same lead volume.

services.title: Customer Satisfaction & Callback Surveys
services.description: Post-service CSAT/NPS calls — flagging unhappy customers for recovery and routing happy ones to review generation.
services.example: Pool service company: Google rating 3.8★/42 reviews → 4.6★/180 reviews in 6 months; monthly churn 14% → 8%.

services.title: Sales Closing & Upsell Calls
services.description: Senior closing agents handling the proposal-to-commitment stage — structured objection handling, tiered packages, and trained negotiation.
services.example: Closing agents for a high-end kitchen renovation co. — proposal close rate 12% → 27% in 8 weeks.

categories.title: Scheduling & Field Dispatch
categories.intro: Real-time coordination between customers, schedules, and field technicians — keeping fleets at 90% capacity and customers informed every step.

services.title: Appointment Booking & Scheduling
services.description: Live or AI booking with calendar sync, automated confirmations, reminder sequences, and no-show prevention protocols.
services.example: Mobile dog grooming co. — no-show rate 18% → 4%; zero double-bookings in 12 months.

services.title: Technician Dispatch & Coordination
services.description: Real-time field dispatch — assigning by location, skill, and equipment with live ETA communication and dynamic re-routing.
services.example: Electrical contractor (22 techs) — unproductive travel 28mi → 11mi/tech/day; ~$4,200/wk fuel + 18 service-hours/day.

services.title: Field Service Job Management
services.description: Digital job cards, tech briefings, parts ordering, photo documentation, completion sign-off, and automatic invoice triggering.
services.example: Commercial HVAC service co. — invoice cycle 12 days → 24 hrs; +$18.4K/mo in previously-unbilled extras.

services.title: Emergency & Priority Dispatch
services.description: Rapid-response dispatch with severity triage, nearest-tech routing, on-call coordination, and SLA-tracked response time reporting.
services.example: Plumbing company: emergency response 94min → 52min; emergency-to-recurring conversion 28% → 61%.

categories.title: Quality & Operations
categories.intro: The infrastructure layer — chat, QA monitoring, post-call admin, and complete operational design — that keeps every contact at consistent quality.

services.title: Live Chat & SMS Support
services.description: Human agents managing website chat and business SMS — pre-sales, support, booking confirmations, with consistent brand tone.
services.example: Landscaping company chat agents 7am–9pm — lead capture from same site traffic +330%.

services.title: Call Recording, Monitoring & QA
services.description: Recording, real-time monitoring, structured QA scoring, compliance documentation, and weekly performance coaching.
services.example: Caught a regulatory exposure of $2.4M for a financial services co. within 10 days of QA program launch.

services.title: CRM Data Entry & Post-Call Admin
services.description: Standardized post-call logging, contact-record updates, follow-up task creation, and CRM hygiene across every interaction.
services.example: Home warranty co. — CRM completeness 18% → 94% in 60 days; agent follow-up conversion +31%.

services.title: Custom Dispatch Workflow Design
services.description: Complete operational architecture — scripts, routing logic, escalation trees, training, and QA rubrics — delivered turnkey.
services.example: Pest control franchise: 4 new locations launched with day-one quality scores matching 3-year-old legacy locations.
